text: Y Y Y Y =Test applicable 8.6.4.2 Type test (Category-II) (a) All bus-ducts supplied shall be of type tested quality. (b) Type test reports for the following shall be submitted: - One minute power frequency voltage withstand test - Temperature rise test. Milli volt drop shall also be measured across bolted flexible joint - Impulse voltage withstand test - Short time current test - Water tightness test (as per IS:8084) - Air leakage test Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 8 (Quality Assurance Plan) 8 - 89 8.6.4.3 Site tests The following minimum tests/ checks shall be conducted at site. Any other tests/ checks as per the manufacturer’s recommendation shall also be carried out - Power frequency voltage withstand test - Air leakage test - Water tightness test on outdoor portion of bus-duct - Insulation resistant measurement of equipment and all wiring - Milli-volt drop Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 8 (Quality Assurance Plan) 8 - 90 8.6.5 Auxiliary Service Transformers 8.6.5.1 Oil-filled Outdoor Transformers Tests/ Checks Items/ Components/ Sub- systems Visual and Dimensional checks Mechanical properties Electrical strength Thermal properties Chemical Composition Compatibility with oil Core Loss (on first Job) Hot Spot NDT, DP or MPI, UT Ageing Test Voltage Ratio, Vector Group and Polarity, Magnetic balance test Make, Type, Rating, Model, TC, General physical Iispection.
